uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (the upstream TTN example carries out-of-range 98.67degC/52.33%). RS1xx float pair is [fractional, decimal] each signed int8, value = decimal + fractional/100: humidity [20,58]=58.20, temperature [45,21]=21.45. options byte 0x04 = alarm; battery-capacity index 4 = 60-80%; counts are big-endian u16. expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js and normalizing temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity.

uplink.description: Aggregated Temp/RH notification (0x02), 2 readings -> top-level + history
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds aggregated frame. Header: options=0, alarmMsgCount=byte[2]=0, backlogMsgCount=big-endian u16 bytes[3..4]=0, battery-capacity byte[5]=5 (80-100%), numberOfReadings byte[6]=2, timestamp big-endian u32 seconds since 2015-01-01Z bytes[7..10]=93784 -> 2015-01-02T02:03:04Z. Two 4-byte [hFrac,hDec,tFrac,tDec] readings: [0,55,10,20]=55.00%/20.10degC and [50,60,30,22]=60.50%/22.30degC. Newest (last) reading is emitted at top level; the older reading goes to history (newest-first). Timestamps/values cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (upstream keeps every reading at the same frame timestamp).

Synthetic in-bounds single backlog frame. options byte 0x02 = configurationError; timestamp big-endian u32 bytes[2..5]=3661 -> 2015-01-01T01:01:01Z; humidity [0,55]=55.00%; temperature [10,20]=20.10degC. expected.data cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Multiple backlog messages (0x04), 2 readings -> top-level + history
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds multi-backlog frame. 3-byte header: options byte 0x01 = serverTimeRequest, numberOfReadings byte[2]=2. Then two 8-byte records [ts(u32 BE), hFrac, hDec, tFrac, tDec]: record1 ts=100000 -> 2015-01-02T03:46:40Z, 55.00%/20.10degC; record2 ts=200000 -> 2015-01-03T07:33:20Z, 60.50%/22.30degC. Newest (last) record at top level, older to history. Values/timestamps cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.

Synthetic in-bounds battery-voltage frame. options=0 -> []. Voltage is an RS1xx float pair [fractional, decimal]=[62,3] -> 3.62 V, mapped to the vocabulary `battery` (volts). expected.data cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic error vector: byte[0]=99 is not a recognized RS1xx uplink message type. Matches the reference's default-case error string.
Synthetic error vector: a 0x01 Temp/RH frame must be exactly 11 bytes; a 3-byte frame is rejected. Matches the reference's length-check error string.
